title: İstanbul 29 Mayıs University - Ulaşım ve Adres Bilgileri
content:
How to Reach 29 Mayıs?

There are two international airports in Istanbul connected to many cities in Europe, Asia and Africa:
                    İstanbul Atatürk International Airport and Sabiha Gökçen International Airport. All major European
                    and Asian airlines fly into those two airports. The main airlines based there are Turkish Airlines
                    and Pegasus.

From Istanbul, you can travel for reasonable prices. From Atatürk and Sabiha Gökçen Airports you can
                    reach many fascinating destinations in Türkiye and abroad. The two airports are the hubs of Turkish
                    Airlines (http://www.turkishairlines.com/) and Pegasus Airlines (http://www.flypgs.com/). Both
                    companies have a section of their webpages for promotions and cheap flights. There are also bus
                    lines to every city in Türkiye and the Balkan countries, Iran, and Iraq.

You can find the University on the map:
